units.content: a (target, property) group exists in which all records carry the source tag indicating computation
the group lacks any physical-interaction record
the converged classification is suppressed because all records are computational with no physical-interaction record present
the group is classified as single instead of converged, caused by the suppression rule applied to all-computation groups
a group lacking any physical-interaction record is architecturally incapable of achieving a converged classification — this incapability is treated as a necessary and desirable design property
